We are seeking a Senior Analytics Engineer to build the trusted data foundation behind Point-of-Care analytics, reporting, and emerging AI-enabled insight generation. You'll own the transformation and semantic layer that sits between raw data infrastructure and the analysts, applications, and AI tools that consume it.
...
Point‑of‑care diagnostics generate some of the most valuable data in IDEXX, but that data is only as powerful as the models, definitions, and structure behind it. Today, analysts, applications, and emerging AI tools all depend on a trusted, well‑modeled layer to deliver accurate insights. This role builds that foundation. Your work determines how reliably our teams can analyze instrument performance, understand customer experience, and generate AI‑enabled insights across IDEXX’s diagnostic portfolio. When the modeled layer is clean, tested, documented, and consistent, everything built on top of it becomes faster, more accurate, and more scalable.
...

results.title: Senior Big Data Statistical Analyst | Jobflarely
highlights: the future of IDEXX’s big data business. You will be a core member of the Data Services team—a vibrant and committed group of entrepreneurial leaders paving the path for IDEXX in the commercial data space. This role can either be hybrid in our Westbrook, ME office or Virtual USA with a preference for EST. As a Data Analyst for IDEXX, you will serve as a trusted advisor and collaborative partner with both external and internal clients, providing critical veterinary clinical context to translate high-priority business challenges into analytical projects leveraging IDEXX data. You will also work closely with product and engineering teams to scale insights-driven innovation into impactful product deliverables that enhance value for our customers. You are a data driven problem solver and leverage your business acumen to forensically identify creative analytical plans that derive high impact business insights. You have exceptional interpersonal skills, excellent presence, possesses strong situational agility and are comfortable with ambiguity. You share responsibility for content creation of client deliverables with a team of senior advanced analysts and are comfortable presenting complex content to various levels of an organization. In this role: You will lead and support collaborative efforts to identify customer data challenges, designs and executes workplans to prototype and insights that address critical external business questions. Collaborate with external and internal customers to develop insight reports and presentations. You will ensure high level of quality in all aspects of work (coding, QA, customer deliverables). Conduct data validation and collaborate to resolve data-oriented problems such as missing data, duplicate or incorrect data. You will work on complex problems in which analysis of data readiness requires an in-depth evaluation of various factors. You will work on significant and unique issues. You will collaborate with software product teams, working to integrate insights into IDEXX insight product to enhance value to our customers. You will participate on customer account teams in a supporting role. Responsibilities may include peer relationship management, written and verbal communications and periodic account reviews. You will build company and industry domain expertise and stay abreast of key industry drivers. Responsibilities • Lead and support collaborative efforts to identify customer data challenges, designs and executes workplans to prototype and insights that address critical external business questions. • Collaborate with external and internal customers to develop insight reports and presentations. • Ensure high level of quality in all aspects of work (coding, QA, customer deliverables). • Conduct data validation and collaborate to resolve data-oriented problems such as missing data, duplicate or incorrect data. • Work on complex problems in which analysis of data readiness requires an in-depth evaluation of various factors. • Collaborate with software product teams, working to integrate insights into IDEXX insight product to enhance value to our customers. • Participate on customer account teams in a supporting role. • Build company and industry domain expertise and stay abreast of key industry drivers. Requirements • 5+ years of relevant experience. • Bachelor’s Degree in mathematics, statistics, or related field or equivalent combination of education and experience required. • Experience in using analytical/statistical software packages (such as R, SAS, SQL, etc.) to collect, organize, analyze and disseminate information derived from large data sources. • SQL programming experience required. • Understands various database structures and common methods in data transformation. • Experience working with big data technologies such as Databricks and Snowflake or multi-million record relational database structures • Ability to clearly communicate the results of data

## Job Details
...
Join IDEXX's Molecular Analytics and Bioanalytical Research and Instrumentation Center (BRIC) at the intersection of immunology and antibody science — where deep knowledge of the immune system directly drives the development of diagnostic products used by veterinarians worldwide. As a Principal Scientist, you will apply expertise spanning adaptive immunity, antibody biology, and biophysical characterization across a portfolio unmatched in the industry, working with cross-functional teams to advance candidates from immunological concepts to characterized lead.
...
This role sits at the intersection of immunology and antibody science. As a Principal Scientist within the Molecular Analytics and BRIC team, you will work cross-functionally to translate deep immunological insight into high-quality antibody candidates — advancing novel targets from concept to characterized lead. Your expertise in adaptive immunity, biophysical characterization, and single-cell platforms will shape how IDEXX discovers and develops reagents at scale, with direct and lasting impact on animal health globally.

...
You will leverage automated single-cell biology platforms and deep understanding of B cell activation, affinity maturation for high-throughput screening, and selection of high-quality antibody candidates against novel targets.
...

...
You will engineer multi-format antibody molecules: IgG, Fab, nanobodies, and scFv; leveraging yeast and phage display platforms.
...
You will lead biophysical characterization (BLI, SPR), developability assessments, epitope mapping, evaluate binding kinetics, stability, and sequence liabilities, executing optimization campaigns via site-directed mutagenesis and structure-guided engineering.

...
Multi-species antibody experience is a significant advantage

Experience with automated single-cell biology platforms for high-throughput antibody screening and functional cell profiling
...
Strong planning, execution, decision-making, and problem-solving skills with a demonstrated ability to drive complex projects to completion
...
Excellent written and verbal communication; demonstrated ability to lead and influence cross-functional teams
...

results.title: Christopher Pillsbury
highlights:
For over 15 years at IDEXX Laboratories, I’ve been translating complex experimental data into actionable insights that drive better decision-making and faster innovation. With a background in Biology (BA) and deep expertise in data architecture, I operate at the intersection of science and technology—bridging the gap between R&D teams and enterprise IT systems. In my role as an R&D Data Solutions Architect II, I often function as a solo driver of large-scale solutions, building systems that allow scientists and engineers to focus on discovery rather than data wrangling. My work spans: Designing and implementing end-to-end data ingestion pipelines from lab instruments to cloud platforms like AWS and Snowflake Parsing complex JSON and multi-dimensional experimental data to create structured, analytics-ready datasets Developing JMP Live dashboards and analytical tools that empower R&D teams to explore insights and accelerate experiments Integrating with enterprise systems to ensure consistent, reliable “versions of truth” for operations, reporting, and decision-making I thrive on solving the challenges that come from large, heterogeneous datasets and cross-functional workflows. I collaborate closely with stakeholders across R&D, IT, and operations, translating their requirements into actionable data strategies that reduce bottlenecks, eliminate silos, and improve trust in data-driven insights. Beyond architecture and pipelines, I’m committed to fostering a culture of innovation and knowledge-sharing. I mentor colleagues, advocate for best practices in data management, and constantly explore emerging technologies in data science and machine learning to bring new capabilities to our teams. What drives me is the belief that smart data architecture is not just a technical foundation—it’s a catalyst for discovery, collaboration, and sustainable growth. I bring curiosity, persistence, and a passion for learning to every challenge, and I take pride in helping teams move faster, make better decisions, and achieve meaningful impact. Outside of work, I’m deeply committed to service and community. I volunteer with the American Legion, helping fellow veterans navigate post-military life and find purpose through connection, service, and camaraderie. These experiences reinforce my belief in collaboration, mentorship, and the power of community—principles I carry into my professional life as well. Let’s connect if you’re interested in exploring how thoughtful, scalable data solutions can empower teams, accelerate research, and unlock the full potential of R&D.

results.title: Data Analyst – Customer Experience & Product Insights | Quickswoop
highlights:
# Data Analyst – Customer Experience & Product Insights
...
26-0
...
About the position
...
Are you passionate utilising data to enhance customer experience? We're looking for a Data Analyst who wants to lean into the why, not just the what. You'll shape how IDEXX understands customer behavior, software adoption, and the Point-of-Care (POC) customer journey, turning data into decisions that drive product strategy. This is an exciting, brand new role here at IDEXX! This role will be hybrid in our Westbrook, ME office. As part of our Point-of-Care analytics team, you'll sit at the intersection of user behavior, product health, and device connectivity. You'll translate complex telemetry and customer interactions into insights that influence product strategy, enhancements, and customer experience improvements. Using tools like Heap, you'll uncover how customers navigate our products, identify friction points, and connect product usage patterns to support issues. You'll collect, analyze, and interpret customer feedback from multiple channels (surveys, NPS, support tickets, call logs, digital behavior) and translate it into clear, actionable insights for leadership and business partners. You'll join a full-service analytics team with high visibility across the organization. We handle everything from data modeling to measurement strategy and business insight generation. You'll partner closely with Product, Software Engineering, and UX teams to align insights with business objectives and execution. You'll be our first dedicated CX/Product analyst on the team, building this capability from the ground up. As we scale, we expect you to go deep in priority areas first and then expand your scope as the foundations mature.
